message:
Align TopicDropdown and LinkCard with brand spec

TopicDropdown:
- Chevron size 16px → 20px per brand guidelines
- Focus ring uses neutral-250 box-shadow instead of primary outline
- Light mode: transparent default, neutral-100 hover, neutral-250 border
- Selected item uses subtle neutral background instead of bright blue
- Explicit 32px height (M size), font-weight 500
- Replace undefined CSS vars (z-index, radius-sm)

LinkCard:
- Use --tnz-text-xs instead of Starlight's --sl-text-xs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
